dock_sign.text: The sign is faded. I can barely read 'Project Taren - Sector 7'.

dock_fuse_box.text: The fuse box is missing a component. The station is powerless.
dock_fuse_box.text_solved: The fuse is in place. Power is restored to the door circuit.

dock_door.text: The door is locked electronically. It needs power to operate.
dock_door.text_powered: The door is powered now, but it requires a secondary authorization code. I should wait for the next build.

collect_fuse.text: I found a rusty fuse in this old crate.
